original_image_tags: The page is a faint, yellowed copy with mirrored (backwards) text showing through from the reverse side or another page. The text is oriented vertically.

elements.description: Two small tape pieces or labels at the top edge with dark circular markings. Below these, the page is primarily composed of faint, reversed typed text bleeding through from the other side, various ink stamps including 'RECEIVED - DIRECTOR F.B.I. JAN 26 4 30 PM 65', 'FBI REC'D - READING ROOM 0 APR 3 22 ML', 'XEROX COPIES DATE 11-24-62', and a small rectangular brown tape or label fragment in the center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements of tape pieces/labels at the top, faint reversed text bleed-through, and various ink stamps, but Description B adds specific stamp text details that Description A omits without contradiction.
